template_families.name: Gap-Formalization (理论/算法)

abstract_blueprint.goal: 一句话讲背景价值和应用面
定义核心问题与判别目标
abstract_blueprint.pattern: We formalize <problem> as <setting> and aim to distinguish <case A> from <case B>.

introduction_blueprint.goal: 背景价值 + 为什么重要
introduction_blueprint.pattern: Probabilistic predictions are at the heart of <domain>.
We focus on <setting>; let <notation> denote <entity>.
However, existing approaches suffer from <limitation>, especially when <hard condition>.
To address this, we formulate <problem> and provide <algorithm/guarantee>.
Our contributions are: (i) ... (ii) ... (iii) ...

reusable_sentence_stems: We initiate the algorithmic study of ... through the lens of ...
To our knowledge, we are the first to formalize ...
Our main contribution is to prove ... by designing ...

template_families.name: Tradeoff-Bridge (MLLM/多模态)

abstract_blueprint.goal: 任务定义 + 痛点冲突
abstract_blueprint.pattern: <Task> has gained attention, yet there is a trade-off between <A> and <B>.
We propose <framework>, which first <step1> and then <step2>.
To reduce computational overhead, we design <efficient component>.
Extensive experiments on <benchmarks> improve both <metric1> and <metric2>.

introduction_blueprint.pattern: <MLLM family> has seen rapid progress across <tasks>.
A key challenge is the gap between <native output space> and <target action/region space>.
There has not been a systematic study of <design choices>.
We empirically identify principles for <continuous/discrete> settings.
Across <N tasks>, our method improves <metric> from <a> to <b>.

reusable_sentence_stems: A key and open challenge is the gap between ... and ...
To address this issue, we propose a training-free framework ...
Extensive experiments show improvements on both semantic and hallucination-related metrics.

template_families.name: Pipeline-Reframing (视觉系统)

abstract_blueprint.pattern: <Task> is critical in <application>, but <occlusion/clutter/etc.> hinders robust correspondence.
The method first <module1>, then <module2> for accurate pair-wise estimation.

introduction_blueprint.goal: 应用场景与任务复杂性
introduction_blueprint.pattern: In practical applications such as <scenario>, <task> becomes critical.
Existing pipelines are roughly divided into <type1> and <type2>.
However, due to <failure mode>, obtaining accurate <correspondence/instance cues> remains difficult.
We first focus on <easier subproblem>, then solve <hard subproblem>.
This decomposition also offers insights for <other tasks>.

reusable_sentence_stems: The core idea is to decompose ... into multiple pair-wise ...
Our primary contribution lies in a new pipeline rather than architecture complexity.
This progressive decomposition holds insights for other tasks.

template_families.name: Task-Benchmark Definition (任务/基准论文)

abstract_blueprint.pattern: The task is challenging because it jointly requires <ability A/B/C>.
We build <dataset> and design <metric> for rigorous evaluation.
We develop a baseline and show superior performance over relevant methods.

introduction_blueprint.pattern: Humans build topological cognitive maps; can AI models gain similar spatial intelligence?
Given <unposed observations>, the task is to build <graph structure>.
Different from prior work that evaluates via downstream tasks, we directly evaluate graph quality.
To facilitate this task, we curate <dataset>, define <metrics>, and provide a Transformer baseline.
In summary, our contributions are two-fold: ...

reusable_sentence_stems: Motivated by this question, we propose the task of ...
To facilitate research, we curated ... and designed ...
In summary, our contributions are two-fold.
